facebook.caption:
Under $10 a person. At a 4.8-star restaurant. On Trần Hưng Đạo, Phu Quoc's main strip.

Bơ restaurant & coffee pulls 740 reviews at that rating. That's not luck. The food hits, the coffee hits, and your wallet stays intact.

If you're staying anywhere near Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, this is your spot. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
